name: Mem0 Memory
description: Long-term semantic memory via a self-hosted Mem0 REST API
author: Sultan Achmad

autoCapture.description: Automatically capture conversation context after agent execution

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant memories before agent execution

recallLimit.description: Maximum memories to recall per query

infer.description: Whether to extract facts from messages

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search memories by natural language with scope and agent filters

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all stored memories with scope and agent filters

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a new fact or context in memory

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a specific memory by ID

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.description: Delete a memory by ID or search query

cliCommands.name: mem0 forget <id>
cliCommands.description: Delete a memory by ID or query
